open_prs.title: [Repo Assist] feat: add l_strtof (float32 string parsing)
[Repo Assist] fix: l_qsort buffer overflow for element sizes > 256 bytes
[Repo Assist] perf: word-at-a-time l_strcmp for aligned inputs
[Repo Assist] feat: add l_strsep (BSD-style string separator)

notes: No human-authored issues. Four open Repo Assist PRs: #85 strtof, #86 qsort fix (re-apply, char tmp[256] UB), and two new April PRs (strcmp perf, strsep). March monthly issue #77 closed. April monthly issue created. Pre-existing l_setenv test failure on Linux (environment limitation, not our bug). Next: buffered I/O helpers (l_fopen-style).
